case_title: PATRICIA SANCINITO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE( CONDITIONAL JAN-30-12) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCINITO, PATRICIA
CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-01-2012 AT 2:00PM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
